text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I can feel the buzz in the stadium all the
way from here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The anticipation keeps building! As soon as we go
out there, the crowd's excitement will burst out in
waves of cheers!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's like I can already feel myself up on the
stage! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I'd love to get up there and wave a
folding fan around!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's here to see us, after all! I have to show
them my stuff!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to hit the accelerator!
